Uses of Package
memory.model

Packages that use memory.model
Package
Description
memory.controller
 
memory.model
 
  • Classes in memory.model used by memory.controller
    Class
    Description
    GameConfig
    Configuration parameters for a new Memory game session (player count, board size, theme).
    GameModel
    Core model of the Memory game – manages the board, players, and game rules.
    GameModelListener
    Observer interface for game-state changes in GameModel.
    Theme
    Available card themes for the Memory game.
  • Classes in memory.model used by memory.model
    Class
    Description
    Card
    A playing card with a unique ID, pair ID, symbol, and current state.
    CardState
    Possible display states of a playing card.
    GameConfig
    Configuration parameters for a new Memory game session (player count, board size, theme).
    GameModelListener
    Observer interface for game-state changes in GameModel.
    Player
    Represents a player with a name and current score.
    Theme
    Available card themes for the Memory game.
